feat_fig_fighting_style.name: Fighter's Fighting Style
feat_fig_fighting_style.description: You adopt a style of fighting as your specialty. Choose one option. You can't take the same Fighting Style option more than once.

style_archery.name: Archery
style_archery.description: You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls you make with ranged weapons.

style_blind_fighting.name: Blind Fighting
style_blind_fighting.description: You have blindsight with a range of 3 meters.

style_defense.name: Defense
style_defense.description: While you are wearing armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC.

style_dueling.name: Dueling
style_dueling.description: When you wield a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons, you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls with that weapon.

style_gwf.name: Great Weapon Fighting
style_gwf.description: When you roll a 1 or 2 on a damage die for a melee weapon attack you make with two hands, you can reroll the die.

style_interception.name: Interception
style_interception.description: Use your reaction to reduce damage to a target within range by 1d10 + PB.

style_protection.name: Protection
style_protection.description: Use your reaction to impose disadvantage on an attack against an ally while wielding a shield.

style_superior_technique.name: Superior Technique
style_superior_technique.description: You learn one maneuver of your choice and gain one superiority die (d6).

style_thrown.name: Thrown Weapon Fighting
style_thrown.description: You can draw a weapon with the thrown property as part of the attack. You gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls with thrown weapons.

style_twf.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
style_twf.description: When you engage in two-weapon fighting, you can add your ability modifier to the damage of the second attack.

style_unarmed.name: Unarmed Fighting
style_unarmed.description: Your unarmed strikes deal 1d6 bludgeoning damage, or 1d8 if you aren't wielding any weapons or a shield. At the start of each of your turns, you can deal 1d4 bludgeoning damage to one creature grappled by you.

feat_fig_second_wind.name: Second Wind
feat_fig_second_wind.description: On your turn, you can use a bonus action to regain hit points equal to 1d10 + your fighter level. Once you use this feature, you must finish a short or long rest before you can use it again.

feat_fig_action_surge.name: Action Surge
feat_fig_action_surge.description: On your turn, you can take one additional action, except the Magic action. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

feat_fig_signature_maneuver.name: Signature Maneuver
feat_fig_signature_maneuver.description: Choose a maneuver you can use once per initiative with a d6 superiority die.

feat_fig_martial_archetype.name: Martial Archetype
feat_fig_martial_archetype.description: At 3rd level, you choose a martial archetype that you strive to emulate in your combat styles and techniques.

feat_fig_martial_versatility.name: Martial Versatility
feat_fig_martial_versatility.description: Whenever you gain an Ability Score Improvement, you can replace one Fighting Style you know with another Fighter Fighting Style. If you know maneuvers, you can also replace one maneuver with another.

feat_fig_asi.name: Ability Score Improvement / Feat
feat_fig_asi.description: You can increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1. Alternatively, you can choose a Feat.

feat_fig_extra_attack.name: Extra Attack
feat_fig_extra_attack.description: You can attack more times when you take the Attack action on your turn.

feat_fig_indomitable.name: Indomitable
feat_fig_indomitable.description: When you fail a saving throw, you can choose to succeed instead of rolling the save by spending one use of this feature.

man_ambush.name: Ambush
man_ambush.description: When you make a Dexterity (Stealth) check or an initiative roll, you can expend one superiority die and add it to the roll.

man_bait_switch.name: Bait and Switch
man_bait_switch.description: When you're within 1.5m of a creature on your turn, you can expend one superiority die and switch places with that creature, then add the die to AC for one of you until the start of your next turn.

man_brace.name: Brace
man_brace.description: When a creature you can see moves into the reach of your melee weapon, you can use your reaction to make one attack against it.

man_commanders_strike.name: Commander's Strike
man_commanders_strike.description: When you take the Attack action, you can forgo one attack and use a bonus action to let an ally make a weapon attack using their reaction.

man_commanding_presence.name: Commanding Presence
man_commanding_presence.description: When you make a Charisma check for Intimidation, Performance, or Persuasion, you can expend one superiority die and add it to the roll.

man_disarming.name: Disarming Attack
man_disarming.description: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, you can expend one superiority die to force it to drop one item it is holding.

man_distracting_strike.name: Distracting Strike
man_distracting_strike.description: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, you can expend one superiority die to give the next attack against it advantage.

man_evasive_footwork.name: Evasive Footwork
man_evasive_footwork.description: When you move, you can expend one superiority die, rolling the die and adding the number rolled to your AC until you stop moving.

man_feinting_attack.name: Feinting Attack
man_feinting_attack.description: As a bonus action, you can expend one superiority die to gain advantage on your next attack against a creature within 1.5m this turn.

man_goading_attack.name: Goading Attack
man_goading_attack.description: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, you can expend one superiority die to force it to make a Wisdom save or have disadvantage on attacks against anyone other than you.

man_grappling_strike.name: Grappling Strike
man_grappling_strike.description: Immediately after you hit a creature with a melee attack, you can expend one superiority die and try to grapple it as a bonus action.

man_lunging_attack.name: Lunging Attack
man_lunging_attack.description: When you make a melee weapon attack on your turn, you can expend one superiority die to increase your reach for that attack.

man_maneuvering_attack.name: Maneuvering Attack
man_maneuvering_attack.description: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, you can expend one superiority die to let an ally move without provoking opportunity attacks.

man_menacing_attack.name: Menacing Attack
man_menacing_attack.description: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, you can expend one superiority die to frighten it until the end of your next turn unless it succeeds on a Wisdom save.

man_parry.name: Parry
man_parry.description: When another creature damages you with a melee attack, you can use your reaction and expend one superiority die to reduce the damage.

man_precision_attack.name: Precision Attack
man_precision_attack.description: When you make a weapon attack roll, you can expend one superiority die to add it to the roll.

man_pushing_attack.name: Pushing Attack
man_pushing_attack.description: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, you can expend one superiority die to push it away from you if it fails a Strength save.

man_quick_toss.name: Quick Toss
man_quick_toss.description: As a bonus action, you can expend one superiority die and make a ranged attack with a thrown weapon.

man_rally.name: Rally
man_rally.description: As a bonus action, you can expend one superiority die to give temporary hit points to a creature who can see or hear you.

man_riposte.name: Riposte
man_riposte.description: When a creature misses you with a melee attack, you can use your reaction and expend one superiority die to make a melee attack against it.

man_sweeping_attack.name: Sweeping Attack
man_sweeping_attack.description: When you hit a creature with a melee attack, you can expend one superiority die to deal damage to another creature within reach.

man_tactical_assessment.name: Tactical Assessment
man_tactical_assessment.description: When you make an Intelligence (History), Intelligence (Investigation), or Wisdom (Insight) check, you can expend one superiority die and add it to the roll.

man_trip.name: Trip Attack
man_trip.description: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, you can expend one superiority die to attempt to knock it prone.

feat_sub_arcane_archer_lore.name: Arcane Archer Lore
feat_sub_arcane_archer_lore.description: Choose proficiency in Arcana or History, and learn Prestidigitation or Thaumaturgy.

feat_sub_arcane_shot.name: Arcane Shot
feat_sub_arcane_shot.description: You learn three Arcane Shot options of your choice. You can use one of them once per turn when you fire an arrow with a shortbow or longbow as part of the Attack action.

arcane_shot_banishing_arrow.name: Banishing Arrow
arcane_shot_banishing_arrow.description: The target must succeed on a Charisma save or be banished until the end of its next turn.

arcane_shot_beguiling_arrow.name: Beguiling Arrow
arcane_shot_beguiling_arrow.description: The target takes psychic damage and one ally of your choice can attempt to charm it until the start of your next turn.

arcane_shot_bursting_arrow.name: Bursting Arrow
arcane_shot_bursting_arrow.description: The target and each creature within 10 feet of it take force damage.

arcane_shot_enfeebling_arrow.name: Enfeebling Arrow
arcane_shot_enfeebling_arrow.description: The target takes necrotic damage and its weapon damage is halved until the start of your next turn on a failed Constitution save.

arcane_shot_grasping_arrow.name: Grasping Arrow
arcane_shot_grasping_arrow.description: The target takes poison damage and is restrained by magical brambles until it escapes or the effect ends.

arcane_shot_piercing_arrow.name: Piercing Arrow
arcane_shot_piercing_arrow.description: Instead of an attack roll, you fire in a line. Creatures in the line make a Dexterity save, taking the arrow's damage on a failed save.

arcane_shot_seeking_arrow.name: Seeking Arrow
arcane_shot_seeking_arrow.description: Instead of an attack roll, the arrow seeks a creature you have seen recently if a path exists.

arcane_shot_shadow_arrow.name: Shadow Arrow
arcane_shot_shadow_arrow.description: The target takes psychic damage and cannot see beyond 5 feet until the start of your next turn on a failed Wisdom save.

feat_sub_magic_arrow.name: Magic Arrow
feat_sub_magic_arrow.description: Nonmagical arrows you fire become magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity.

feat_sub_curving_shot.name: Curving Shot
feat_sub_curving_shot.description: When you miss with a magic arrow, you can use a bonus action to reroll the attack against a different target within 60 feet.

feat_sub_additional_arcane_shot_option.name: Additional Arcane Shot Option
feat_sub_additional_arcane_shot_option.description: You gain one additional Arcane Shot option.

feat_sub_ever_ready_shot.name: Ever-Ready Shot
feat_sub_ever_ready_shot.description: If you roll initiative and have no uses of Arcane Shot remaining, you regain half of them, rounded up.

feat_sub_student_of_war.name: Student of War
feat_sub_student_of_war.description: You gain proficiency with one type of artisan's tools of your choice.

feat_sub_combat_superiority.name: Combat Superiority
feat_sub_combat_superiority.description: You learn three maneuvers of your choice and gain four superiority dice, which are d6s.

feat_sub_additional_maneuvers.name: Additional Maneuvers
feat_sub_additional_maneuvers.description: You learn two additional maneuvers of your choice.

feat_sub_additional_superiority_die.name: Additional Superiority Die
feat_sub_additional_superiority_die.description: You gain one additional superiority die.

feat_sub_know_enemy.name: Know Your Enemy
feat_sub_know_enemy.description: After observing a creature for at least 1 minute, you can learn whether it is superior, equal, or inferior relative to you in several categories.

feat_sub_restless.name: Restless
feat_sub_restless.description: Once per initiative, when you use Action Surge or Second Wind, you gain a superiority die.

feat_sub_cavalier_bonus_proficiency.name: Cavalier's Bonus Proficiency
feat_sub_cavalier_bonus_proficiency.description: You gain proficiency in one skill of your choice from Animal Handling, History, Insight, Performance, or Persuasion. Alternatively, you can learn one language of your choice.

feat_sub_born_to_the_saddle.name: Born to the Saddle
feat_sub_born_to_the_saddle.description: You have advantage on checks and saves to avoid falling off a mount, and mounting or dismounting costs you only 1.5m of movement.

feat_sub_unwavering_mark.name: Unwavering Mark
feat_sub_unwavering_mark.description: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, you can mark it until the end of your next turn.

feat_sub_warding_maneuver.name: Warding Maneuver
feat_sub_warding_maneuver.description: Use your reaction to add 1d8 to AC against an attack; if it still hits, the target gains resistance to that attack's damage.

feat_sub_hold_the_line.name: Hold the Line
feat_sub_hold_the_line.description: When a creature enters your reach, you can use your reaction to make an opportunity attack against it. If you hit, its speed becomes 0 for the rest of the turn.

feat_sub_ferocious_charger.name: Ferocious Charger
feat_sub_ferocious_charger.description: If you move at least 3 meters straight toward a target before you hit it, you can force it to make a Strength save or be knocked prone.

feat_sub_vigilant_defender.name: Vigilant Defender
feat_sub_vigilant_defender.description: In combat, you get a special reaction that you can use on every creature's turn except your own, but only for opportunity attacks.

feat_sub_improved_critical.name: Improved Critical
feat_sub_improved_critical.description: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

feat_sub_remarkable_athlete.name: Remarkable Athlete
feat_sub_remarkable_athlete.description: You can add half your proficiency bonus, rounded up, to Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution checks that don't already use proficiency.

feat_sub_additional_fighting_style.name: Additional Fighting Style
feat_sub_additional_fighting_style.description: You gain one additional Fighting Style.

feat_sub_superior_critical.name: Superior Critical
feat_sub_superior_critical.description: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 18, 19, or 20.

feat_sub_survivor.name: Survivor
feat_sub_survivor.description: At the start of each of your turns, you regain hit points equal to 5 + your Constitution modifier if you have no more than half your hit points left.

feat_sub_spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
feat_sub_spellcasting.description: You augment your martial prowess with the ability to cast spells. You use Intelligence as your spellcasting ability, and you learn spells from the arcanist spell list with school restrictions.

feat_sub_weapon_bond.name: Weapon Bond
feat_sub_weapon_bond.description: You bond with up to two weapons and can summon a bonded weapon to your hand as a bonus action.

feat_sub_war_magic.name: War Magic
feat_sub_war_magic.description: When you use your action to cast a cantrip, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

feat_sub_eldritch_strike.name: Eldritch Strike
feat_sub_eldritch_strike.description: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, that creature has disadvantage on the next saving throw it makes against a spell you cast before the end of your next turn.

feat_sub_arcane_charge.name: Arcane Charge
feat_sub_arcane_charge.description: When you use Action Surge, you can teleport up to 9 meters to an unoccupied space you can see.

feat_sub_improved_war_magic.name: Improved War Magic
feat_sub_improved_war_magic.description: When you use your action to cast a spell, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

feat_sub_knighthood.name: Knighthood
feat_sub_knighthood.description: You are part of a legion-bound martial order, tied to rank, honor, and command.

feat_sub_rallying.name: Rallying
feat_sub_rallying.description: When you use Second Wind, you can also grant healing to nearby allies. You can also forgo one attack to let an ally act with their reaction.

feat_sub_knights_standard.name: Knight's Standard
feat_sub_knights_standard.description: As an action, you plant your banner to bolster allies nearby.

feat_sub_royal_envoy.name: Royal Envoy
feat_sub_royal_envoy.description: You gain expertise in one Charisma skill you are proficient with, and allies near your banner resist charm better.

feat_sub_bulwark.name: Bulwark
feat_sub_bulwark.description: Your banner and presence help hold the line and protect allies.

feat_sub_legion_commander.name: Legion Commander
feat_sub_legion_commander.description: Your banner's range increases and allies in range gain more protection and mobility.

feat_sub_uncheckable.name: Uncheckable
feat_sub_uncheckable.description: Allies in your banner range are extremely difficult to flank and you become resistant to several disabling conditions.

feat_sub_rune_carver.name: Rune Carver
feat_sub_rune_carver.description: You learn two runes of your choice and can inscribe them onto objects after a long rest.

rune_cloud.name: Cloud Rune
rune_cloud.description: You gain advantage on Sleight of Hand and Deception checks. As a reaction, you can redirect an attack against a creature within 9 meters.

rune_fire.name: Fire Rune
rune_fire.description: You gain double proficiency with tools. When you hit with a weapon attack, you can restrain the target with fiery shackles.

rune_frost.name: Frost Rune
rune_frost.description: You gain advantage on Animal Handling and Intimidation checks. As a bonus action, you can gain a bonus to Strength and Constitution checks and saves.

rune_hill.name: Hill Rune
rune_hill.description: You gain resistance to poison damage and advantage on saves against poison. As a bonus action, you can gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage for 1 minute.

rune_stone.name: Stone Rune
rune_stone.description: You gain advantage on Insight checks and darkvision. As a reaction, you can charm and immobilize a creature that ends its turn near you.

rune_storm.name: Storm Rune
rune_storm.description: You gain advantage on Arcana checks and can't be surprised while conscious. As a bonus action, you can enter a prophetic state that lets you impose advantage or disadvantage on rolls nearby.

feat_sub_giants_might.name: Giant's Might
feat_sub_giants_might.description: As a bonus action, you become Large if you aren't already, gain advantage on Strength checks and saves, and once per turn deal extra damage on a hit.

feat_sub_runic_shield.name: Runic Shield
feat_sub_runic_shield.description: When a creature you can see within 9 meters is hit by an attack, you can force the attacker to reroll the d20.

feat_sub_great_stature.name: Great Stature
feat_sub_great_stature.description: Your rune magic permanently alters your body and your stature continues to grow.

feat_sub_master_of_runes.name: Master of Runes
feat_sub_master_of_runes.description: You can invoke each rune you know twice before needing a short or long rest.

feat_sub_runic_juggernaut.name: Runic Juggernaut
feat_sub_runic_juggernaut.description: Your Giant's Might damage increases and you can become Huge when you use it.

classes.name: Fighter
classes.description: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor.

hp_details.at_higher_levels: 1d10 (or 6) + your Constitution modifier per Fighter level after 1st

proficiencies_desc.armor: Light armor, medium armor, heavy armor, shields
proficiencies_desc.skills: Choose two from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Perception, or Survival

classes.quick_build: Make Strength or Dexterity your highest ability score. Your next-highest score should be Constitution, or Intelligence if you plan to become an Eldritch Knight. Choose the soldier background.
classes.multiclassing: Ability Score Minimum: Strength 13 or Dexterity 13. Proficiencies gained from multiclassing: light armor, medium armor, shields, simple weapons, and martial weapons.

subclasses.name: Arcane Archer
subclasses.description: A fighter who uses magic to empower ranged attacks.

subclasses.name: Battle Master
subclasses.description: A tactical fighter who masters battlefield maneuvers.

subclasses.name: Cavalier
subclasses.description: A mounted protector and defender of allies.

subclasses.name: Champion
subclasses.description: A martial specialist focused on physical perfection and critical hits.

subclasses.name: Eldritch Knight
subclasses.description: A fighter who blends martial prowess with arcane spellcasting.

subclasses.name: Legion Banneret
subclasses.description: A battlefield leader whose banner inspires and protects allies.

subclasses.name: Rune Knight
subclasses.description: A fighter who channels giant magic through runes and transformation.
